$comment: Uses local overlay ports that fetch from upstream repositories:
- vcpkg_ports/jemalloc: Port that fetches from https://github.com/tamatebako/jemalloc v5.5.0
- vcpkg_ports/dwarfs: Port for DwarFS library (builds from local source)
Note: tamatebako/jemalloc is not a full vcpkg registry (no versions/baseline.json),
so we use an overlay port instead of a git registry
